texto: This is what science can do for us, if we let it. If offers us an opportunity to lower our defenses and experience the ways that we are all connected.

texto: Not being assaulted is not a privilege to be earned through the judicious application of personal safety strategies. A woman should be able to walk down the street at 4 in the morning in nothing but her socks, blind drunk, without being assaulted, and I, for one, am not going to do anything to imply that she is in any way responsible for her own assault if she fails to Adequately Protect Herself. Men aren’t helpless dick-driven maniacs who can’t help raping a vulnerable woman. It disrespects EVERYONE.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Emily Nagoski sobre temas ligados a autoestima. A afirmação “Not being assaulted is not a privilege to be earned through the judicious application of personal…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a autoestima, assault, men, útil em momentos de bom-dia e men.

A woman should be able to walk down the street at 4 in the morning in nothing but her socks, blind drunk, without being assaulted, and I, for one, am not going to do anything to imply that she is in any way responsible for her own assault if she fails to Adequately Protect Herself. texto: About 10 to 20 percent of both men and women report an increase in their sexual interest when they're anxious or depressed. But a guy who wants sex more when he's anxious or depressed probably has less sensitive brakes. In contrast, a woman who wants sex more when she's anxious or depressed is likely to have a more sensitive accelerator.
